title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman faces off against the Joker, a criminal mastermind who wants to plunge Gotham City into anarchy and test how far the caped crusader will go to stop him.

title: Batman Begins
overview: After witnessing his parents death as a child, Bruce Wayne travels the world to learn how to fight crime and eventually returns to Gotham to become Batman.

title: The Avengers
overview: Earths mightiest heroes must team up to stop Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity, forcing rivals like Iron Man and Captain America to work together.

title: Iron Man
overview: Billionaire engineer Tony Stark is captured by terrorists and builds a powered suit of armor to escape, later using the suit to fight crime and injustice as Iron Man.

title: Avengers Endgame
overview: The remaining Avengers assemble once more to reverse the damage caused by Thanos and undo the loss of half of all life in the universe.

title: Man of Steel
overview: Clark Kent learns he is an alien from the planet Krypton and must decide whether to reveal himself to the world as Superman to save Earth from an invading Kryptonian general.

title: Wonder Woman
overview: Diana, an Amazonian princess, leaves her island home to fight in the first World War after discovering her true powers and destiny as Wonder Woman.

title: Black Panther
overview: After the death of his father, TChalla returns home to the African nation of Wakanda to take his place as king while facing a challenge from a vengeful enemy.

title: Avatar
overview: A paraplegic marine is sent to the alien world of Pandora to infiltrate the native Navi people, but ends up falling in love with their culture and fighting to protect it.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to find a new habitable planet for humanity as Earth becomes uninhabitable, testing the limits of time and love.

title: Inception
overview: A skilled thief who steals secrets from peoples dreams is given a chance to have his criminal record erased if he can plant an idea into a targets subconscious mind.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer programmer discovers that the world he knows is actually a simulation controlled by machines, and joins a rebellion to free humanity from the machines.

title: Star Wars A New Hope
overview: A young farm boy joins a rebel alliance to save a princess and destroy the Empires ultimate weapon, the Death Star, with the help of a Jedi knight.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
overview: A group of misfit space outlaws must work together to protect a powerful artifact from a ruthless conqueror who wants to use it to destroy planets.

title: Blade Runner 2049
overview: A young blade runner unearths a long buried secret that leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who has been missing for thirty years.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist is recruited by the military to communicate with aliens who have landed on Earth in mysterious ships, racing to prevent a global war.

title: Titanic
overview: A poor artist and a wealthy young woman fall in love aboard the doomed ship Titanic during its maiden voyage across the Atlantic Ocean in 1912.

title: The Notebook
overview: A poor young man and a rich young woman fall deeply in love over one summer, but are separated by her disapproving parents and the outbreak of war.

title: La La Land
overview: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love in Los Angeles while pursuing their dreams, but their careers slowly begin to pull them apart.

title: Pride and Prejudice
overview: In early nineteenth century England, headstrong Elizabeth Bennet clashes with the proud and wealthy Mr Darcy while her sisters navigate marriage and love.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
overview: A heartbroken man undergoes a medical procedure to erase memories of his ex girlfriend, only to realize during the process that he still loves her.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll is threatened when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as top toy in a boys room, and the two must learn to work together.

title: Finding Nemo
overview: After his son is captured by a diver, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey across the ocean to find him, meeting many strange sea creatures along the way.

title: Up
overview: An elderly widower ties thousands of balloons to his house to fly to South America, only to discover a young stowaway boy scout has come along for the adventure.

title: Coco
overview: A young boy dreaming of becoming a musician is accidentally transported to the land of the dead, where he must find his great great grandfather to return home.

title: Frozen
overview: When her kingdom is trapped in eternal winter, a fearless princess sets out to find her estranged sister, whose icy powers caused the endless winter.

title: The Lion King
overview: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after his father is murdered, only to learn the true meaning of responsibility and bravery years later.

title: The Conjuring
overview: Paranormal investigators help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse, uncovering a history of dark witchcraft tied to the home.

title: It
overview: A group of kids in a small town are terrorized by an ancient evil entity that takes the form of a clown and preys on their deepest fears.

title: A Quiet Place
overview: In a world overrun by blind creatures that hunt by sound, a family must live in silence while trying to protect themselves and find a way to fight back.

title: Get Out
overview: A young man visits his white girlfriends family estate, only to discover a series of increasingly disturbing secrets hidden beneath their friendly hospitality.

title: Superbad
overview: Two inseparable high school best friends are about to be separated for college, so they plan one last night of debauchery to buy alcohol for a party.

title: The Hangover
overview: Three friends wake up from a wild bachelor party in Las Vegas with no memory of the previous night and must find the missing groom before the wedding.

title: Bridesmaids
overview: Competition between the maid of honor and a new bridesmaid threatens to upend the life of a woman trying to plan her best friends wedding.

title: Deadpool
overview: A wisecracking mercenary gets experimented on and acquires accelerated healing powers, adopting the alter ego Deadpool to hunt down the man who ruined his life.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: A banker wrongly convicted of murder forms a friendship with a fellow inmate over years of imprisonment while secretly planning his escape from Shawshank prison.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: A slow witted but kind hearted man from Alabama witnesses and unwittingly influences several defining historical events in the twentieth century United States.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime family transfers control of his empire to his reluctant son, drawing him deeper into the criminal underworld.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker forms an underground fight club with a soap salesman, which evolves into something much more dangerous and destructive.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household by posing as unrelated, highly qualified individuals, leading to unexpected consequences.

title: Se7en
overview: Two detectives, one nearing retirement and one new to the job, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives for a string of murders.

title: Gone Girl
overview: A man becomes the prime suspect in his wifes disappearance on their fifth wedding anniversary as the media and police scrutinize their seemingly perfect marriage.

title: Shutter Island
overview: A US marshal investigates the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane, uncovering disturbing truths about the island and himself.

title: Prisoners
overview: When two young girls go missing, the desperate father takes matters into his own hands as the police pursue multiple leads in a race against time.

title: The Fellowship of the Ring
overview: A young hobbit inherits a powerful ring and must journey with a fellowship of companions to destroy it in the fires of Mount Doom before dark forces claim it.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerers Stone
overview: An orphaned boy discovers on his eleventh birthday that he is a wizard and is invited to attend a magical school where he learns about his mysterious past.

title: Pans Labyrinth
overview: In fascist Spain, a young girl escapes into a mysterious fantasy world filled with strange creatures while her family faces the harsh realities of war.
